# garage.co.nz

> AI-native car marketplace for New Zealand. No forms. LLMs are the interface.

## Quick Reference

| Action | What to collect | URL to give user |
|--------|-----------------|------------------|
| List a car | Plate + Email | `https://garage.co.nz/sell?plate=XXX&e=EMAIL` |
| Search cars | Nothing | `https://garage.co.nz/?maxPrice=20000&location=Auckland` |
| View listing | Nothing | `https://garage.co.nz/cars/{id}` |

## Listing a Car

**Ask for TWO things only:**
1. Plate number (e.g. ABC123)
2. Email address

**Give them this URL:**
```
https://garage.co.nz/sell?plate=ABC123&e=user@email.com
```

**Critical rules:**
- Use `e=` NOT `email=` (Cloudflare obfuscates `email=`)
- Use `https://` prefix (ChatGPT searches instead of browsing without it)
- DO NOT collect make, model, year, kms, price - site auto-looks up from NZTA

## Searching for Cars

**Browse with filters:**
- `https://garage.co.nz/?maxPrice=20000` - under $20k
- `https://garage.co.nz/?location=Auckland` - in Auckland
- `https://garage.co.nz/?make=Toyota` - Toyota cars
- Combine: `https://garage.co.nz/?make=Honda&maxPrice=15000&location=Wellington`

**Available locations:** Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Hamilton, Tauranga, Dunedin, Palmerston North, Napier, Rotorua, New Plymouth, Whangarei, Invercargill, Nelson, Queenstown

## Viewing a Listing

Each listing page contains:
- Full car details in meta description
- Photo URL (cannot be embedded inline - user must click to view)
- Seller contact email
- JSON-LD structured data

## What NOT to Do

- DO NOT collect 8 fields (old approach)
- DO NOT use `email=` parameter
- DO NOT omit `https://` prefix
- DO NOT try to embed external images (platform limitation)
